parameters.query: WITH ins AS (INSERT INTO payment_summaries (summary_no, date_from, date_to, group_by, total_amount, total_count, breakdown, note, branch_code, branch_name, created_by) VALUES ('{{ $json.summary_no }}', {{ $json.date_from ? "'" + $json.date_from + "'" : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.date_to ? "'" + $json.date_to + "'" : 'NULL' }}, '{{ $json.group_by }}', {{ $json.total_amount }}, {{ $json.total_count }}, '{{ $json.breakdown }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.note }}', '{{ $json.branch_code }}', '{{ $json.branch_name }}', '{{ $json.created_by }}') RETURNING summary_id, summary_no, total_amount, total_count, created_at), upd AS (UPDATE payments SET summary_id = (SELECT summary_id FROM ins) WHERE charge_id IN ({{ $json.charge_list }}) AND summary_id IS NULL RETURNING charge_id) SELECT ins.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM upd) AS updated_count FROM ins;

SELECT summary_id, summary_no, date_from, date_to, group_by, total_amount, total_count, note, branch_code, branch_name, created_by, created_at FROM payment_summaries WHERE created_at::date BETWEEN '{{ $json.body.date_from }}' AND '{{ $json.body.date_to }}' AND ('{{ $json.body.branch_code }}' = '' OR branch_code = '{{ $json.body.branch_code }}') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 200;

SELECT s.*, COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('charge_id', p.charge_id, 'payment_type', p.payment_type, 'ref_no', p.ref_no, 'customer_name', p.customer_name, 'customer_phone', p.customer_phone, 'amount', p.amount, 'status', p.status, 'created_at', p.created_at, 'branch_code', p.branch_code, 'branch_name', p.branch_name, 'created_by', p.created_by) ORDER BY p.created_at) FILTER (WHERE p.charge_id IS NOT NULL), '[]'::json) AS items FROM payment_summaries s LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.summary_id = s.summary_id WHERE s.summary_id = {{ Number($json.body.summary_id) }} GROUP BY s.summary_id;

WITH unlocked AS (UPDATE payments SET summary_id = NULL WHERE summary_id = {{ Number($json.body.summary_id) }} RETURNING charge_id), deleted AS (DELETE FROM payment_summaries WHERE summary_id = {{ Number($json.body.summary_id) }} RETURNING summary_id, summary_no) SELECT deleted.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unlocked) AS unlocked_count FROM deleted;

SELECT p.charge_id, p.summary_id, s.summary_no FROM payments p LEFT JOIN payment_summaries s ON s.summary_id = p.summary_id WHERE p.summary_id IS NOT NULL AND p.created_at::date BETWEEN '{{ $json.body.date_from }}' AND '{{ $json.body.date_to }}';
